name: Smykowski
description: A 6k run paired with 60 burpee pull-ups — a running-heavy chipper with one demanding gymnastics movement.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/smykowski (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-08; official Rx adds an optional load: 'If you've got body armor or a 30-lb vest, wear it.'
